# kCGImagePropertyHasAlpha

**Global Variable**

A Boolean value that indicates whether the image has an alpha channel.

## Declaration

```swift
let kCGImagePropertyHasAlpha: CFString
```

## Discussion

The value of this key is a [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/CFBoolean]. The value is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/CoreFoundation/kCFBooleanTrue] when the image contains an alpha channel.

## Color Information

- **kCGImagePropertyNamedColorSpace**: The name of the image’s color space.
- **kCGImagePropertyProfileName**: The name of the optional International Color Consortium (ICC) profile embedded in the image, if known.
- **kCGImagePropertyColorModel**: The color model of the image, such as RGB, CMYK, grayscale, or Lab.
- **kCGImagePropertyColorModelRGB**: A Red Green Blue (RGB) color model.
- **kCGImagePropertyColorModelCMYK**: A Cyan Magenta Yellow Black (CMYK) color model.
- **kCGImagePropertyColorModelGray**: A grayscale color model.
- **kCGImagePropertyColorModelLab**: A Lab color model, where color values contain the amount of light and the amounts of four human-perceivable colors.
